text.title: CQRS Pattern Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply CQRS Pattern end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: define-bounded-context-and-aggregates
step.action: Pin aggregates + commands + events for the bounded context. Each command targets one aggregate.

step.name: split-write-and-read-stores
step.action: Write store optimized for transactional consistency (relational); read store(s) per access pattern (search index, denormalized table).

step.name: implement-projections
step.action: Each read model has a projection that consumes events from the write side; projection idempotent on replay.

step.name: install-eventual-consistency-affordances
step.action: Surface stale-read tolerance in the UI (e.g. show command-accepted spinner until read model catches up).

step.name: validate-and-monitor
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-cqrs-pattern.py --self-test`; monitor projection lag; alert if lag >SLA.

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
